svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/28.2.5 Chrome/138.0.7204.251 Electron/37.6.1 Safari/537.36" version="28.2.5"> <diagram id="IRzXXTQ_UMQtQiHLGQuK" name="第 1 页"> <mxGraphModel dx="742" dy="506" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="iE8ibWhJCKAI-gkIGT7H-1" value="可用空间spare room" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=center;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;glass=0;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="200" y="160" width="170" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="iE8ibWhJCKAI-gkIGT7H-2" value="TCP 数据" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;sketch=1;curveFitting=1;jiggle=2;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="370" y="160" width="110" height="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="iE8ibWhJCKAI-gkIGT7H-3" value="接收缓存RevBuffer" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" parent="1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="200" y="290" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="480" y="290" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="iE8ibWhJCKAI-gkIGT7H-4" value="RevWindow" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" parent="1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="200" y="150" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="370" y="150" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="iE8ibWhJCKAI-gkIGT7H-6" value="传输层的数据" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" parent="1" target="iE8ibWhJCKAI-gkIGT7H-1" edge="1"> <mxGeometry x="-1" y="-40" width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="160" y="220" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="150" y="220" as="targetPoint" /> <mxPoint x="-40" y="-40" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="iE8ibWhJCKAI-gkIGT7H-7" value="应用进程" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" parent="1" source="iE8ibWhJCKAI-gkIGT7H-2" edge="1"> <mxGeometry x="1" y="30" width="50" height="50" relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="500" y="220" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="520" y="220" as="targetPoint" /> <mxPoint x="30" y="30" as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
